process_details: Physical mixtures prepared by gentle mortar mixing for 5 min, dried 10 min at 373 K (to remove water from IDP hemihydrate), then melted in aluminum dish on hot plate at T = 440 K for <=2 min. Vitrification by fast transfer of dish from hot plate to a cold copper plate. Samples analyzed immediately after preparation.
detection_methods: XRD (Rigaku-Denki D/MAX RAPID II-R, Ag K_alpha); DSC (Mettler-Toledo DSC 1, 5 and 10 K/min); TMDSC (TOPEM, 0.5 K/min); BDS (Novo-Control Alpha); ATR-FTIR.
notes: Storage T = 297 K (= 23.85 C), RH = 25% (quasi-constant). DSC at 5 K/min showed no recrystallization for any mixture. Tg from TMDSC at 0.5 K/min (Table 1). Pure EZB recrystallized within 21 days (Dc=15%) under same conditions, providing strong reference for stabilization effect. Authors found no specific molecular EZB-IDP interactions (FTIR); stabilization attributed to antiplasticizing effect of higher-Tg IDP. | [review] Protokolla 297 K (24 C) / 25% RH ei sovi mihinkaan standardiluokkaan: ei ICH Q1A long-term (60% RH), ei dry_short_term (RH ei 0% eika <30 vrk), ei accelerated

Massoista laskettu arvo (~15.2%) tukee 14.9-arvoa; Table 1 sisältää ilmeisesti painovirheen.
